title: Korbond - 50 Piece Safety Pin Pack, Nickel, Packaging may vary
features: LARGE PACK: This set contains 50 pins, meaning there is enough to tailor garments, create craft projects and do emergency repairs
NICKEL PLATED & TEMPERED STEEL: Korbond Steel Safety Pins are made from expertly hardened through the steel tempering process and finished with nickel plating, making them rust resistant

KORBOND QUALITY: The Korbond Safety Pins are unmatched in quality, featuring a durable spring lock mechanism and specially hardened steel, Korbond sewing accessories are reliable and are crafted for long lasting use
SAFETY: Korbond Safety Pins feature a sharp pointed tip, which is covered by a safety clasp in order to avoid injury, however care must still be taken when pins are in use

MULTI PURPOSE: Ideal for quilting, sewing, crafting, baby clothing, jewellery making, fashion design, saree pinning, nappies, running, marathons and sports events, DIY, repairs, upcycling, emergency hemming and general household tasks
description: From the manufacturer NICKEL PLATED Korbond Steel Safety Pins are made from expertly hardened through the steel tempering process and finished with nickel plating, making them rust resistant.
